OA1nbd: ​I don't like putting restaurants down, but this was a total flop.​Marketing yourself as Halal shouldn't mean delivering subpar service to a …
KmCjbd: Thank you sincerely for taking the time to share your experience, and we are truly sorry for what you went through — this is not the standard we hold ourselves to, and we will do better. We want to be transparent: today was our soft opening and we where completely unplanned in terms of the volume of guests we welcomed. Our POS system was only set up a few days ago, and today was truly the first time our team got to work with it in a real environment. The fact that your meal never arrived, that you waited 45 minutes for drinks, and that the orders got mixed up — none of that is acceptable, and we take full responsibility. We are grateful you stayed, grateful you spoke with us. We sincerely hope you will give us another chance to show you the experience we are truly capable of delivering. You will not be disappointed. With heartfelt appreciation,The 1001 Nuit Team
